---
pagetitle: "Peritoneal Summit 2027 — Spiez, Switzerland"
toc: false
---

::: {.summit-hero}

::: {.save-the-date}
Save the date
:::

# 2nd Peritoneal Summit

::: {.summit-date}
8 – 10 September 2027
:::

::: {.summit-venue}
Spiez, Switzerland
:::

The leading international meeting on peritoneal research and technology, connecting peritoneum enthusiasts across disciplines.

::: {.cta-buttons}
[See the program](program.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[About the venue](venue.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

:::

## About the Summit

The Peritoneal Summit brings together surgeons, immunologists, oncologists, nephrologists, bioengineers, and basic scientists with a shared interest in the peritoneum — a tissue that bridges immunity, repair, fibrosis, and disease.

The inaugural Summit took place in January 2025 in Pontresina, Switzerland ([read about the 2025 edition](past/2025.qmd)). The 2nd Summit returns in September 2027, this time in scenic Spiez on Lake Thun, with an expanded program of keynote talks, workshops, and campfire sessions for early-career researchers.

## What to expect

- **Expert keynote speakers and chairs** across peritoneal biology, surgery, and bioengineering
- **Interactive workshops** on imaging, single-cell, and translational methods
- **Campfire sessions** — informal evening gatherings designed especially for early-career scientists travelling alone
- **A scenic alpine setting** in Spiez, walking distance from the train station and 30 minutes from Bern

## Registration

Registration opens **September 2026** (~12 months before the summit). Subscribe to updates or follow the organizers on LinkedIn for announcements.

[Registration details →](registration.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
